'''âh-zh-d-t''' ('''kahazhdetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dack|dack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dack|dack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-zh-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhdetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
